IDENTIFYING THE CYCLE
OF INCOMPETENCE IN A
STRUGGLING TEAM
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

TOP 5 CHARACTERISTICS
OF A STRUGGLING TEAM
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 19 --

TOP 5 CHARACTERISTICS OF A STRUGGLING TEAM
VOID OF VISION (NO SPECIFIC GOALS EACH WEEK/MONTH/YEAR)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 19 --

TOP 5 CHARACTERISTICS OF A STRUGGLING TEAM
VOID OF VISION (NO SPECIFIC GOALS EACH WEEK/MONTH/YEAR)
LEADERS DEFLECT RESPONSIBILITY (BLAME IT ON THE TEAM)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 19 --

TOP 5 CHARACTERISTICS OF A STRUGGLING TEAM
VOID OF VISION (NO SPECIFIC GOALS EACH WEEK/MONTH/YEAR)
LEADERS DEFLECT RESPONSIBILITY (BLAME IT ON THE TEAM)
TEAM RESISTS ACCOUNTABILITY (BLAMING OUTSIDE CIRCUMSTANCE)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 19 --

TOP 5 CHARACTERISTICS OF A STRUGGLING TEAM
VOID OF VISION (NO SPECIFIC GOALS EACH WEEK/MONTH/YEAR)
LEADERS DEFLECT RESPONSIBILITY (BLAME IT ON THE TEAM)
TEAM RESISTS ACCOUNTABILITY (BLAMING OUTSIDE CIRCUMSTANCE)
AVOIDANCE OF CONFLICT (SILENCE RATHER THAN ARGUMENTS)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 19 --

TOP 5 CHARACTERISTICS OF A STRUGGLING TEAM
VOID OF VISION (NO SPECIFIC GOALS EACH WEEK/MONTH/YEAR)
LEADERS DEFLECT RESPONSIBILITY (BLAME IT ON THE TEAM)
TEAM RESISTS ACCOUNTABILITY (BLAMING OUTSIDE CIRCUMSTANCE)
AVOIDANCE OF CONFLICT (SILENCE RATHER THAN ARGUMENTS)
WITHHOLDING OF TRUST (NEITHER GIVEN NOR RECEIVED)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 19 --

NEGATIVE
ASSUMPTIONS
WRONG
ACTIONS
NO
CONFRONTATION
CASTING
BLAME
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 19 --

HOW TO BREAK THE CYCLE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 19 --

POSITIVE
ASSUMPTIONS
WRONG
ACTIONS
PRODUCTIVE
CONFRONTATION
TEAM ACCEPTS
RESPONSIBILITY
PRODUCTIVE
ACTION
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 19 --

STEPS TO BREAKING THE CYCLE
1. DIAGNOSE ROOT OF DYSFUNCTION (WE CANNOT CHANGE WHAT
WE CANNOT DEFINE) AS A LEADER ACCEPT THAT YOU ARE
ALWAYS SOMEWHAT THE ROOT CAUSE.
2. YOU CANNOT CORRECT WHAT YOU WILL NOT CONFRONT.
YOU
ARE ADDRESSING BEHAVIOR NOT PERSON.
3. GIVE THE TEAM OR INDIVIDUAL A PATH TO PERFORM.
4. CELEBRATE WHEN THEY IMPROVE, OR LET THEM GO WHEN
THEY DON’T. PERIOD.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 11 of 19 --

THE MOST POWERFUL TOOL YOU
HAVE IN LEADING YOUR IS YOUR
OWN PERSONAL EXAMPLE
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 19 --

WHAT DO MAJORITY OF LEADERS
STRUGGLE WITH IN THIS CYCLE?
CONFRONTATION
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 19 --

STOP INTERPRETING CONFRONTATION AS
SOMETHING HOSTILE OR NEGATIVE AND
START VIEWING IT WAS SIMPLY
TELLING THE TRUTH
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 14 of 19 --

EASY ICEBREAKERS FOR THESE CONVERSATIONS
“WHAT I AM GOING TO TELL YOU MAY NOT BE EASY TO HEAR, BUT I
AM TELLING YOU BECAUSE I REALLY VALUE AND CARE ABOUT YOU…”
“YOU KNOW I TAKE YOUR GROWTH TO HEART AS WELL AS MY ROLE
AS YOUR BOSS AND BECAUSE OF THAT IT IS MY RESPONSIBILITY TO
TELL YOU THE HARD THINGS EVEN WHEN I DON’T WANT TO…”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 15 of 19 --

VERY FEW PEOPLE ARE NATURALLY
“CONFRONTATIONAL” HOWEVER MOST PEOPLE
DO WANT TO IDENTIFY WITH BEING HONEST
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 16 of 19 --

VERY FEW PEOPLE ARE NATURALLY
“CONFRONTATIONAL” HOWEVER MOST PEOPLE
DO WANT TO IDENTIFY WITH BEING HONEST
IT TAKES PRACTICE (ROLE PLAY, WRITTEN, ETC..)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 17 of 19 --

VERY FEW PEOPLE ARE NATURALLY
“CONFRONTATIONAL” HOWEVER MOST PEOPLE
DO WANT TO IDENTIFY WITH BEING HONEST
IT TAKES PRACTICE (ROLE PLAY, WRITTEN, ETC..)
IT WILL BE UNCOMFORTABLE, BUT EASIER WITH TIME
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 18 of 19 --

QUESTIONS TO ASK YOURSELF
ON A SCALE OF 1-10 HOW HEALTHY IS YOUR TEAM?
WHAT QUALITY IS WEAKEST ON YOUR TEAM?
WHAT IS THE ROOT CAUSE OF THE WEAKNESS?
WHAT WILL YOU DO TO ADDRESS THIS?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 19 --
